---
name: Bug Fix
about: Fix a defect in CyberMem
title: "fix: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Analysis
<!-- AGENT: You MUST fill this out. Do not fix blindly. -->

### Symptom
- What happened? (e.g. "500 Error on /health")

### Root Cause
- Why did it happen? (e.g. "Race condition in init")

### Fix Strategy
- How we fixed it? (e.g. "Added mutex lock")

### Prevention
- How to ensure it never happens again? (e.g. "Added regression test")

## Verification
- [ ] Regression Test Added?
- [ ] Verified on Environment where bug occurred?
